message:
fix(fwc): policy command and e2e script minor fixes, beads tracker update

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -526,7 +526,7 @@
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7","title":"[ergonomics] Replace limit-schema TODOs and scaffold-generator placeholder output","description":"Close the remaining ergonomics and schema gaps that teach the wrong habits: TODO-based limit metadata and a connector generator that emits dead placeholder operations. This epic should make generated connectors truthful from day one and complete the missing limit metadata so connector behavior, docs, and validation logic stay aligned.","acceptance_criteria":"- Discord and Telegram limit models cover the missing operation families from the audit and are validated by unit or fixture coverage plus end-to-end request or CLI scripts with detailed logs.
- fwc new emits truthful minimal viable connector skeletons instead of dead placeholder runtime code.
- Generator unit or golden tests, scanner integration, and end-to-end generator smoke scripts prevent TODO or placeholder leakage back into emitted code.","notes":"Generator work should consume the connector truth model from 2.1, 2.6, and 2.5 rather than inventing a parallel scaffold status scheme. Generated code should be minimally runnable and honest about unsupported capabilities. If a scaffold leaves extension points for a human author, those extension points should be explicit comments or failing tests, not runtime placeholder operations advertised as real capabilities.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:30:04.589919Z","created_by":"Codex","updated_at":"2026-04-03T00:49:59.074866Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ergonomics","limits","placeholders","scaffolding"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:30:04.589919Z","created_by":"Codex","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2300,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7","author":"Codex","text":"This epic is about preventing new debt from being generated. A truthful generator and complete limit metadata reduce the odds of repeating the same placeholder cleanup in another wave.","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:30:05Z"},{"id":2308,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7","author":"Codex","text":"Operational note: treat this bead as a coordination/closure node, not the default claim target. Prefer claiming its concrete leaf tasks unless the work is explicitly cross-cutting orchestration across multiple child beads.","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:40:21Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.1","title":"[limits] Complete Discord limit metadata for attachments and components","description":"Complete the Discord limit metadata that is still marked TODO. This should include the missing attachment and component-related constraints for the supported or planned operation families so validation, docs, and error handling do not silently diverge from reality.","acceptance_criteria":"- Discord limit metadata covers the attachment and component families called out in the audit.
- Comprehensive unit tests or validation fixtures plus connector-level integration coverage prove the values are enforced consistently and unsupported surfaces stay truthful.
- End-to-end CLI or request scripts emit detailed logs showing validation, refusal, and user-facing error explanations.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:09.584812Z","created_by":"Codex","updated_at":"2026-04-03T02:18:38.240156Z","closed_at":"2026-04-03T02:18:38.239877Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["discord","limits","validation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:09.584812Z","created_by":"Codex","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2333,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.1","author":"Codex","text":"Audit anchors: connectors/discord/src/limits.rs TODO for attachment/component limits. Verification contract: unit tests or fixtures for the limit values, connector-level validation coverage, and end-to-end CLI/request scripts with detailed logs proving the limit model is enforced and explained truthfully.","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:40:27Z"},{"id":2339,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.1","author":"jemanuel","text":"SunnyMoose 2026-04-02: Completed Discord limit metadata in connectors/discord/src/limits.rs. Added: embed fields (EMBED_FIELDS_MAX_COUNT=25, field name/value/footer/author max chars), attachments (ATTACHMENTS_MAX_COUNT=10, ATTACHMENT_MAX_BYTES=25MB/50MB/100MB by boost level), components (ACTION_ROWS_MAX=5, BUTTONS_PER_ROW=5, SELECT_OPTIONS=25, CUSTOM_ID=100 chars, button/placeholder/modal limits), modals (MODAL_COMPONENTS=5, title/label/input limits), stickers (STICKERS_MAX=3). Added 5 unit tests. Verification: 10 tests pass via rch (5 lib + 5 integration).","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:18:37Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.2","title":"[limits] Complete Telegram limit metadata for callback, media-group, and upload surfaces","description":"Complete the Telegram limit metadata that is still marked TODO. Cover callback data, media-group semantics, upload-size ceilings, and any adjacent limit values needed so connector behavior and validation logic stop relying on a knowingly incomplete model.","acceptance_criteria":"- Telegram limit metadata covers callback, media-group, and upload-size surfaces from the audit.
- Comprehensive unit tests or validation fixtures plus connector-level integration coverage prove the values are enforced consistently and intentionally unsupported surfaces stay truthful.
- End-to-end CLI or request scripts emit detailed logs showing validation, refusal, and user-facing error explanations.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:10.181203Z","created_by":"Codex","updated_at":"2026-04-03T02:11:11.976610Z","closed_at":"2026-04-03T02:11:11.976435Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["limits","telegram","validation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:10.181203Z","created_by":"Codex","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2334,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.2","author":"Codex","text":"Audit anchors: connectors/telegram/src/limits.rs TODO for callback/media/upload limits. Verification contract: unit tests or fixtures for the limit values, connector-level validation coverage, and end-to-end CLI/request scripts with detailed logs proving the limit model is enforced and explained truthfully.","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:40:27Z"},{"id":2338,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.2","author":"jemanuel","text":"SunnyMoose 2026-04-02: Completed Telegram limit metadata in connectors/telegram/src/limits.rs. Added: CALLBACK_DATA_MAX_BYTES (64), CALLBACK_ANSWER_TEXT_MAX_CHARS (200), CALLBACK_ANSWER_URL_MAX_CHARS (256), MEDIA_GROUP_MIN_ITEMS (2), MEDIA_GROUP_MAX_ITEMS (10), PHOTO_UPLOAD_MAX_BYTES (10MB), FILE_UPLOAD_MAX_BYTES (50MB), FILE_DOWNLOAD_MAX_BYTES (20MB), INLINE_KEYBOARD_MAX_BUTTONS_PER_ROW (8), INLINE_KEYBOARD_MAX_ROWS (100), LONG_POLL_MAX_TIMEOUT_SECS (50), GET_UPDATES_MAX_LIMIT (100). Added 5 unit tests verifying spec compliance and ordering invariants. Verification: 5 new tests + 250 existing lib tests pass via rch.","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:11:11Z"}]}
-{"id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","title":"[scaffolding] Redesign fwc new to emit truthful minimal viable connectors","description":"Redesign fwc new so generated connectors start from a truthful minimal viable baseline instead of dead runtime placeholders. The generator should emit a compiling connector skeleton with honest manifest metadata, explicit extension points, and no placeholder_operation, api client not implemented, or bidirectional send not implemented paths in the runtime surface.","acceptance_criteria":"- Newly generated connectors compile and handshake from a truthful minimal baseline.
- Emitted runtime code contains no placeholder_operation or equivalent dead-path placeholders.
- Generated connectors default to the explicit truthful non-live state defined by the graduation or quarantine model and emit a minimal verification recipe or script scaffold aligned to the shared evidence convention, with unit tests and end-to-end generator smoke scripts validating emitted manifests, runtime behavior, and logs.","notes":"The generator should leave new connector authors with a truthful starting point and an obvious first verification path. That means the emitted scaffold should not only avoid dead runtime placeholders; it should also point authors at the right minimal smoke checks, transcript expectations, and next implementation steps without inventing a second status model.","status":"blocked","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RubySnow","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:10.773594Z","created_by":"Codex","updated_at":"2026-04-03T20:09:34.538863Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fwc","generator","scaffolding","truthfulness"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:00:28.159281Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:19.643944Z","created_by":"Codex","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.2.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:48:31.221216Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:38:58.603738Z","created_by":"Codex","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:10.773594Z","created_by":"Codex","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2335,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","author":"Codex","text":"Audit anchors: crates/fwc/src/new_cmd.rs generator templates that currently emit TODO-heavy placeholder operations and dead runtime paths. Verification contract: unit tests for emitted template shaping, integration coverage that the generated crate compiles/handshakes truthfully, and end-to-end generator smoke scripts with detailed logs proving the output defaults to the correct truthful non-live state.","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:40:28Z"},{"id":2379,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","author":"RubySnow","text":"Claimed this bead. Write set is currently limited to crates/fwc/src/new_cmd.rs. Scope: replace generated dead-path placeholder operations and not-implemented scaffold strings with a truthful minimal non-live connector baseline that can still compile, handshake, and introspect honestly; keep verification rch-only for any Cargo work.","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:00:07Z"},{"id":2380,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","author":"jemanuel","text":"Implemented the scaffold redesign in crates/fwc/src/new_cmd.rs. The generator now emits an honest incubating local-only scaffold centered on scaffold_status instead of fake placeholder/live semantics. Waiting on rch verification: cargo check -p fwc --all-targets and cargo test -p fwc new_cmd -- --nocapture.","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:17:17Z"},{"id":2383,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","author":"jemanuel","text":"Implementation in crates/fwc/src/new_cmd.rs is complete. Remote verification is currently blocked upstream: both rch exec -- cargo check -p fwc --all-targets and rch exec -- cargo test -p fwc new_cmd -- --nocapture failed in /dp/asupersync/src/http/h1/listener.rs:493 with error[E0425] cannot find function payload_to_string in this scope. No fwc-local compiler or test failure surfaced before that dependency break.","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:24:36Z"},{"id":2393,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","author":"jemanuel","text":"Continuing work past the blocked verification state: now investigating and fixing the upstream asupersync compiler failure that is preventing rch verification from completing for this bead.","created_at":"2026-04-03T20:06:29Z"},{"id":2394,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","author":"jemanuel","text":"Patched the direct asupersync path references in seven Cargo manifests from the machine-local /dp/asupersync alias to the real sibling checkout path ../../../asupersync so rch can sync current dependency source instead of relying on stale worker-local state. Re-running rch verification now.","created_at":"2026-04-03T20:09:34Z"}]}

The generator should emit a compiling connector skeleton with honest manifest metadata, explicit extension points, and no placeholder_operation, api client not implemented, or bidirectional send not implemented paths in the runtime surface.","acceptance_criteria":"- Newly generated connectors compile and handshake from a truthful minimal baseline.

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4","title":"[scaffolding] Add generator regression tests so new connectors never ship with runtime placeholders","description":"Add regression protection around the generator so placeholder output does not creep back in. Golden tests, snapshots, or comparable checks should verify both emitted code and manifests, and they should integrate with the production placeholder scanner so generated runtime code cannot silently regress to TODO-heavy dead ends.","acceptance_criteria":"- Generator regression tests fail on TODO or placeholder markers in emitted runtime code or manifests.
- The proof layer includes unit, golden, or snapshot coverage, scanner integration, and end-to-end generator smoke scripts with detailed logs and artifacts.
- Future generator template changes are forced through the truthful-runtime standard rather than reintroducing dead placeholder paths.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:11.386263Z","created_by":"Codex","updated_at":"2026-04-03T17:52:57.380826Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["generator","scaffolding","tooling","verification"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:19.900718Z","created_by":"Codex","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:00:27.586943Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:11.386263Z","created_by":"Codex","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:20.165652Z","created_by":"Codex","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2336,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4","author":"Codex","text":"Audit anchors: crates/fwc/src/new_cmd.rs and the broader placeholder scanner/allowlist rules. Verification contract: keep golden/snapshot unit tests for emitted files, integrate them with the production placeholder scanner, and add end-to-end generator smoke scripts with detailed logs so regressions in emitted runtime code are caught mechanically.","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:40:28Z"},{"id":2388,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4","author":"SunnyOak","text":"Split generator regression protection into file-level goldens and scanner/smoke integration. The intent is to catch both template drift and end-to-end scaffold truth regressions instead of treating all generator breakage as one undifferentiated test failure.","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:52:57Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4.1","title":"[scaffolding] Freeze golden fixtures for truthful generated connector output","description":"Background: once `fwc new` emits truthful scaffolds, the repo still needs a regression layer that inspects the emitted files themselves. Without golden coverage, future template edits can quietly reintroduce TODO-heavy runtime shells while the generator still appears to work.

Scope: add golden or snapshot coverage for emitted manifests, runtime code, and scaffold-status metadata from `fwc new`. Verify that the generated connector starts in the correct truthful non-live state, contains no dead runtime placeholder operations, and points authors at the expected verification entrypoints.

Acceptance: template regressions are caught by file-level golden coverage before they leak into downstream connector work, and the emitted baseline remains self-consistent across manifest metadata, runtime behavior, and author guidance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:52:46.516711Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","updated_at":"2026-04-03T20:12:09.819070Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["generator","golden-tests","scaffolding","verification"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:52:55.515408Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:52:46.516711Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2408,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4.1","author":"SunnyOak","text":"Group generator-proof note: the goldens and scan or smoke verification here need to prove that freshly generated connectors are truthful from the first scaffold. Require stable fixtures, scanner output, smoke logs, and rerun commands so future generator changes fail loudly and locally instead of reintroducing runtime placeholders by accident.","created_at":"2026-04-03T20:12:09Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4.2","title":"[scaffolding] Integrate generator regression tests with scanning and smoke verification","description":"Background: file-level goldens are necessary but not sufficient; the generator also needs to stay integrated with the placeholder scanner and a minimal smoke path so future changes cannot pass isolated tests while breaking the real workflow.

Scope: wire generator regression tests into the placeholder scanner and a minimal smoke harness that exercises scaffold creation, compile or handshake readiness, and evidence-bundle entrypoint generation. Treat this as the guardrail that keeps the repo from generating fresh placeholder debt after 24llg closes.

Acceptance: scanner and smoke-harness failures make it obvious whether the regression came from template content, scaffold-status semantics, emitted verification instructions, or downstream runtime truthfulness, and the resulting artifacts are strong enough for the final placeholder-closure audit.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:52:47.080689Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","updated_at":"2026-04-03T20:12:10.233046Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["generator","scaffolding","scanning","verification"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:52:56.348640Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:52:47.080689Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:52:55.967474Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2409,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.7.4.2","author":"SunnyOak","text":"Group generator-proof note: the goldens and scan or smoke verification here need to prove that freshly generated connectors are truthful from the first scaffold. Require stable fixtures, scanner output, smoke logs, and rerun commands so future generator changes fail loudly and locally instead of reintroducing runtime placeholders by accident.","created_at":"2026-04-03T20:12:10Z"}]}

@@ -1714,7 +1714,7 @@ mod tests {
 
     #[test]
     fn plan_linear_chain() {
-        let mut a = make_scenario(
+        let a = make_scenario(
             "a",
             "A",
             ScenarioCategory::Smoke,
